g.text: marid-telegram - channel gateway - render - inline keyboards - multipart files
Marid Gateway - @marid/gateway - /marid/attach-detach-bindings-self-bindings - owns U bound SSE filter

red = @marid/gateway (Marid Gateway - API/ingress); orange = marid-telegram (channel gateway, a client); amber = @marid/channel-client (shared, PH-7 reuses); dark = session core (reused). Mirroring = owns U bound; view-via-binding, act-via-ownership.
